summary: iOS 🟥 FALCON | Incorrect device name on DFU success screen while updating just the Charge Stand
scenario: DFU success screen shows headset name instead of Charge Stand name after updating only Charge Stand firmware
description_clean: When updating only the Charge Stand firmware, the DFU success screen incorrectly displays the headset name instead of the Charge Stand name.
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Connect a headset that has a Charge Stand
Go to Device Settings for the connected headset
Initiate a firmware update for the Charge Stand only (not the headset)
Wait for the DFU (Device Firmware Update) process to complete
Observe the DFU success screen that appears after the update finishes
expected: The DFU success screen should display the name of the Charge Stand (e.g., "Charge Stand updated successfully").
actual: The DFU success screen incorrectly displays the headset name instead of the Charge Stand name.
